headline: IFF Reshapes Portfolio With $4.3 Billion Sale, Targets Higher-Margin Business
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances shares are down slightly after agreeing to sell its Food Ingredients unit to CVC for $4.3 billion.

headline: IFF’s Grasse R&D Field Deepens Naturals Expertise And Investor Narrative
summary: IFF's LMR Naturals unit has opened Domaine des Naturels LMR, an experimental R&D field in Grasse. The site focuses on sustainable natural ingredients, agronomic research, and preservation of local agricultural heritage. International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) operates in fragrance, flavor, and ingredient solutions used across consumer products and food. With the new Grasse field, the company is adding a dedicated space to study cultivation and extraction of natural raw materials as...

headline: IFF Enters Into Agreement to Sell Its Food Ingredients Business to CVC
summary: NEW YORK, May 29, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF), a global leader in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients, and health and biosciences, today announced that it has entered into an agreement to sell its Food Ingredients business to funds advised by CVC Capital Partners, a leading global private markets manager, in a transaction that values the business at approximately $4.3 billion, representing an enterprise value-to-EBITDA multiple of approximately 10x.
